targets.rawSql:
WITH
  cur AS (
    SELECT count() AS v
    FROM cvat.events
    WHERE scope = 'send:exception'
      AND timestamp >= $__fromTime
      AND timestamp <= $__toTime
      AND source IN (${sources})
      AND length(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'))) > 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'permissiondenied') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'validationerror:') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'django.http.response.http404') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'you do not have permission to perform this action.') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'limitreachedexception:') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'throttled') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'request failed with status code 429') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'matches the given query.') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cloud storage instance was deleted') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cvatdatasetnotfounderror') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authenticationfailed') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'no media data found') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authentication credentials were not provided') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'rest_framework.exceptions.notacceptable: could not satisfy the request accept header') = 0
  ),
  prev AS (
    SELECT count() AS v
    FROM cvat.events
    WHERE scope = 'send:exception'
      AND timestamp >= ($__fromTime - ($__toTime - $__fromTime))
      AND timestamp < $__fromTime
      AND source IN (${sources})
      AND length(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'))) > 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'permissiondenied') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'validationerror:') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'django.http.response.http404') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'you do not have permission to perform this action.') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'limitreachedexception:') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'throttled') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'request failed with status code 429') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'matches the given query.') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cloud storage instance was deleted') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cvatdatasetnotfounderror') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authenticationfailed') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'no media data found') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authentication credentials were not provided') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'rest_framework.exceptions.notacceptable: could not satisfy the request accept header') = 0
  )
SELECT
  cur.v AS total_errors,
  if(prev.v = 0, NULL, round((cur.v - prev.v) * 100.0 / prev.v, 2)) AS delta_percent
FROM cur CROSS JOIN prev

WITH
  cur AS (
    SELECT uniqExactIf(user_id, isNotNull(user_id)) AS v
    FROM cvat.events
    WHERE scope = 'send:exception'
      AND timestamp >= $__fromTime
      AND timestamp <= $__toTime
      AND source IN (${sources})
      AND length(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'))) > 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'permissiondenied') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'validationerror:') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'django.http.response.http404') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'you do not have permission to perform this action.') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'limitreachedexception:') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'throttled') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'request failed with status code 429') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'matches the given query.') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cloud storage instance was deleted') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cvatdatasetnotfounderror') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authenticationfailed') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'no media data found') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authentication credentials were not provided') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'rest_framework.exceptions.notacceptable: could not satisfy the request accept header') = 0
  ),
  prev AS (
    SELECT uniqExactIf(user_id, isNotNull(user_id)) AS v
    FROM cvat.events
    WHERE scope = 'send:exception'
      AND timestamp >= ($__fromTime - ($__toTime - $__fromTime))
      AND timestamp < $__fromTime
      AND source IN (${sources})
      AND length(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'))) > 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'permissiondenied') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'validationerror:') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'django.http.response.http404') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'you do not have permission to perform this action.') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'limitreachedexception:') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'throttled') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'request failed with status code 429') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'matches the given query.') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cloud storage instance was deleted') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cvatdatasetnotfounderror') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authenticationfailed') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'no media data found') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authentication credentials were not provided') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'rest_framework.exceptions.notacceptable: could not satisfy the request accept header') = 0
  )
SELECT
  cur.v AS unique_users_impacted,
  if(prev.v = 0, NULL, round((cur.v - prev.v) * 100.0 / prev.v, 2)) AS delta_percent
FROM cur CROSS JOIN prev

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    source,
    lowerUTF8(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message')) AS msg_lower
  FROM cvat.events
  WHERE scope = 'send:exception'
    AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND source IN (${sources})
    AND length(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'))) > 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'permissiondenied') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'validationerror:') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'django.http.response.http404') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'you do not have permission to perform this action.') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'limitreachedexception:') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'throttled') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'request failed with status code 429') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'matches the given query.') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cloud storage instance was deleted') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cvatdatasetnotfounderror') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authenticationfailed') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'no media data found') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authentication credentials were not provided') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'rest_framework.exceptions.notacceptable: could not satisfy the request accept header') = 0
), categorized AS (
  SELECT
    multiIf(
      position(msg_lower, 'network error') > 0, 'Network Error',
      position(msg_lower, 'bad gateway') > 0, '502 Bad Gateway',
      position(msg_lower, 'gateway time-out') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, '504 gateway') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'code 504 received') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'timeout exceeded') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'request aborted') > 0, '504 Gateway Timeout',
      position(msg_lower, 'server error') > 0, '500 Server Error',
      position(msg_lower, 'no available server') > 0, 'No available server / service unavailable',
      position(msg_lower, 'redis.exceptions') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'kvrocks') > 0, 'Redis / kvrocks',
      position(msg_lower, 'django.db.utils.operationalerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'database system is') > 0, 'Postgres / DB (operational)',
      position(msg_lower, 'integrityerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'foreign key constraint') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'unique constraint') > 0, 'Postgres / DB (integrity)',
      position(msg_lower, 'rq.timeouts.jobtimeoutexception') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'takes too long chunks') > 0, 'Timeouts / background jobs',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'cannot read properties of') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'can''t access property') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'objectstate must be provided correct label, got wrong value undefined') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cannot set properties of undefined') > 0), 'JS null/undefined access',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'is not a function') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'is not iterable') > 0), 'JS type/method errors',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'setting getter-only property') > 0, 'JS read-only property assignment',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'the start frame is out of the job') > 0, 'Client validation / frame bounds',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'canvas') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'webgl') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'createimagebitmap') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'createobjecturl') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'getimagedata') > 0), 'Canvas / WebGL / memory',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'react error') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, '__reactfiber') > 0), 'React / DOM',
      source = 'client' AND (startsWith(msg_lower, '**shapes**') OR startsWith(msg_lower, '**labels**')), 'Debug logging / shapes dump',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'queryselector') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'not a valid selector') > 0), 'JS DOM API / Selectors',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'session has not been initialized yet. call annotations.get() or annotations.clear({ reload: true }) before') > 0, 'CVAT-core / Business Logic',
      position(msg_lower, 'reached the maximum number of projects') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cachetoolargedataerror') > 0, 'Quotas / size limits',
      position(msg_lower, 'decompressionbomberror') > 0, 'Quotas / size limits (image bomb)',
      position(msg_lower, 'polygon must have at least') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'all the objects must have the same label') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'expected only one visible shape per frame') > 0, 'Geometry / annotation rules',
      position(msg_lower, 'action name must be unique') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'all label names must be unique') > 0, 'Uniqueness / names / ids',
      position(msg_lower, 'label') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, 'is not registered for this task') > 0, 'Labels not registered',
      position(msg_lower, 'trying to save an attribute') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, 'invalid value') > 0, 'Attributes invalid value',
      position(msg_lower, 'unsupported media type') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'file must be file instance') > 0, 'Unsupported / invalid input',
      position(msg_lower, 'unexpected type of track') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'skeleton template must be specified') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cannot join these polygons: the operation would create a shape with holes, which is not supported by cvat. please select different polygons or use the mask tool.') > 0, 'Geometry / annotation rules',
      position(msg_lower, 'oserror: [errno 36]') > 0, 'OS error / file system',
      startsWith(msg_lower, 'rest_framework.exceptions.notfound'), 'DRF 404 / NotFound',
      position(msg_lower, 'rest_framework.exceptions.methodnotallowed') > 0, 'DRF MethodNotAllowed',
      position(msg_lower, 'datumaro.components.errors') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'annotationexporterror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'itemexporterror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'repeateditemerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'datumaro.components.contexts.importer._importfail') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'there is no item named ''project.json'' in the archive') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'there is no item named ''task.json'' in the archive') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'no media data found') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'no image found') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cvat.apps.dataset_manager.bindings.cvatimporterror') > 0, 'Import/Export / Datumaro',
      position(msg_lower, 'cloudstoragemissingerror') > 0, 'Cloud storage / file missing',
      position(msg_lower, 'invalidimageerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'unidentifiedimageerror') > 0, 'Invalid image file',
      position(msg_lower, 'runtimeerror: exception occurred during compression of image') > 0, 'Image compression errors',
      position(msg_lower, 'av.error') > 0, 'AV / codec errors',
      position(msg_lower, 'filenotfounderror: [errno 2] no such file or directory') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'manifest.jsonl') > 0, 'File not found / missing file',
      position(msg_lower, 'not found on the cloud storage') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'resource ali-') > 0, 'Cloud storage / file not found',
      position(msg_lower, 'trying to use undefined cloud storage') > 0, 'Cloud storage / config error',
      position(msg_lower, 'already being processed (action=') > 0, 'Concurrent export/import / duplicate request',
      position(msg_lower, 'duplicate key value violates unique constraint') > 0, 'DB duplicate key',
      position(msg_lower, 'locknotownederror') > 0, 'Redis lock / concurrency',
      'Other / uncategorized'
    ) AS category
  FROM base
), agg AS (
  SELECT category, count() AS error_count
  FROM categorized
  GROUP BY category
)
SELECT
  category,
  round(error_count * 100.0 / sum(error_count) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM agg
ORDER BY percentage DESC

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    source,
    lowerUTF8(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message')) AS msg_lower
  FROM cvat.events
  WHERE scope = 'send:exception'
    AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND source IN (${sources})
    AND length(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'))) > 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'permissiondenied') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'validationerror:') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'django.http.response.http404') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'you do not have permission to perform this action.') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'limitreachedexception:') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'throttled') = 0
  AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'request failed with status code 429') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'matches the given query.') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cloud storage instance was deleted') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cvatdatasetnotfounderror') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authenticationfailed') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'no media data found') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authentication credentials were not provided') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'rest_framework.exceptions.notacceptable: could not satisfy the request accept header') = 0
   
), categorized AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfDay(timestamp) AS time,
    multiIf(
      position(msg_lower, 'network error') > 0, 'Network Error',
      position(msg_lower, 'bad gateway') > 0, '502 Bad Gateway',
      position(msg_lower, 'gateway time-out') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, '504 gateway') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'code 504 received') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'timeout exceeded') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'request aborted') > 0, '504 Gateway Timeout',
      position(msg_lower, 'server error') > 0, '500 Server Error',
      position(msg_lower, 'no available server') > 0, 'No available server / service unavailable',
      position(msg_lower, 'redis.exceptions') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'kvrocks') > 0, 'Redis / kvrocks',
      position(msg_lower, 'django.db.utils.operationalerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'database system is') > 0, 'Postgres / DB (operational)',
      position(msg_lower, 'integrityerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'foreign key constraint') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'unique constraint') > 0, 'Postgres / DB (integrity)',
      position(msg_lower, 'rq.timeouts.jobtimeoutexception') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'takes too long chunks') > 0, 'Timeouts / background jobs',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'cannot read properties of') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'can''t access property') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'objectstate must be provided correct label, got wrong value undefined') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cannot set properties of undefined') > 0), 'JS null/undefined access',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'is not a function') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'is not iterable') > 0), 'JS type/method errors',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'setting getter-only property') > 0, 'JS read-only property assignment',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'the start frame is out of the job') > 0, 'Client validation / frame bounds',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'canvas') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'webgl') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'createimagebitmap') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'createobjecturl') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'getimagedata') > 0), 'Canvas / WebGL / memory',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'react error') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, '__reactfiber') > 0), 'React / DOM',
      source = 'client' AND (startsWith(msg_lower, '**shapes**') OR startsWith(msg_lower, '**labels**')), 'Debug logging / shapes dump',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'queryselector') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'not a valid selector') > 0), 'JS DOM API / Selectors',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'session has not been initialized yet. call annotations.get() or annotations.clear({ reload: true }) before') > 0, 'CVAT-core / Business Logic',
      
      position(msg_lower, 'reached the maximum number of projects') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cachetoolargedataerror') > 0, 'Quotas / size limits',
      position(msg_lower, 'decompressionbomberror') > 0, 'Quotas / size limits (image bomb)',
      position(msg_lower, 'polygon must have at least') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'all the objects must have the same label') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'expected only one visible shape per frame') > 0, 'Geometry / annotation rules',
      position(msg_lower, 'action name must be unique') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'all label names must be unique') > 0, 'Uniqueness / names / ids',
      position(msg_lower, 'label') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, 'is not registered for this task') > 0, 'Labels not registered',
      position(msg_lower, 'trying to save an attribute') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, 'invalid value') > 0, 'Attributes invalid value',
      position(msg_lower, 'unsupported media type') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'file must be file instance') > 0, 'Unsupported / invalid input',
      position(msg_lower, 'unexpected type of track') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'skeleton template must be specified') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cannot join these polygons: the operation would create a shape with holes, which is not supported by cvat. please select different polygons or use the mask tool.') > 0, 'Geometry / annotation rules',
      position(msg_lower, 'oserror: [errno 36]') > 0, 'OS error / file system',
      startsWith(msg_lower, 'rest_framework.exceptions.notfound'), 'DRF 404 / NotFound',
      position(msg_lower, 'rest_framework.exceptions.methodnotallowed') > 0, 'DRF MethodNotAllowed',
      
      position(msg_lower, 'datumaro.components.errors') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'annotationexporterror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'itemexporterror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'repeateditemerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'datumaro.components.contexts.importer._importfail') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'there is no item named ''project.json'' in the archive') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'there is no item named ''task.json'' in the archive') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'no media data found') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'no image found') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cvat.apps.dataset_manager.bindings.cvatimporterror') > 0, 'Import/Export / Datumaro',
      position(msg_lower, 'cloudstoragemissingerror') > 0, 'Cloud storage / file missing',
      position(msg_lower, 'invalidimageerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'unidentifiedimageerror') > 0, 'Invalid image file',
      position(msg_lower, 'runtimeerror: exception occurred during compression of image') > 0, 'Image compression errors',
      position(msg_lower, 'av.error') > 0, 'AV / codec errors',
      position(msg_lower, 'filenotfounderror: [errno 2] no such file or directory') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'manifest.jsonl') > 0, 'File not found / missing file',
      position(msg_lower, 'not found on the cloud storage') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'resource ali-') > 0, 'Cloud storage / file not found',
      position(msg_lower, 'trying to use undefined cloud storage') > 0, 'Cloud storage / config error',
      position(msg_lower, 'already being processed (action=') > 0, 'Concurrent export/import / duplicate request',
      position(msg_lower, 'duplicate key value violates unique constraint') > 0, 'DB duplicate key',
      position(msg_lower, 'locknotownederror') > 0, 'Redis lock / concurrency',
      'Other / uncategorized'
    ) AS metric
  FROM base
)
SELECT
  time,
  count() AS value,
  metric
FROM categorized
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time ASC

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    'current' AS period,
    source,
    user_id,
    lowerUTF8(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message')) AS msg_lower
  FROM cvat.events
  WHERE scope = 'send:exception'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime
    AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND source IN (${sources})
    AND length(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'))) > 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'permissiondenied') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'validationerror:') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'django.http.response.http404') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'you do not have permission to perform this action.') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'limitreachedexception:') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'throttled') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'request failed with status code 429') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'matches the given query.') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cloud storage instance was deleted') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cvatdatasetnotfounderror') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authenticationfailed') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'no media data found') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authentication credentials were not provided') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'rest_framework.exceptions.notacceptable: could not satisfy the request accept header') = 0

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'previous' AS period,
    source,
    user_id,
    lowerUTF8(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message')) AS msg_lower
  FROM cvat.events
  WHERE scope = 'send:exception'
    AND timestamp >= ($__fromTime - ($__toTime - $__fromTime))
    AND timestamp < $__fromTime
    AND source IN (${sources})
    AND length(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'))) > 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'permissiondenied') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'validationerror:') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'django.http.response.http404') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'you do not have permission to perform this action.') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'limitreachedexception:') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'throttled') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'request failed with status code 429') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'matches the given query.') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cloud storage instance was deleted') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cvatdatasetnotfounderror') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authenticationfailed') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'no media data found') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authentication credentials were not provided') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'rest_framework.exceptions.notacceptable: could not satisfy the request accept header') = 0
), categorized AS (
  SELECT
    period,
    source,
    user_id,
    multiIf(
      position(msg_lower, 'network error') > 0, 'Network Error',
      position(msg_lower, 'bad gateway') > 0, '502 Bad Gateway',
      position(msg_lower, 'gateway time-out') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, '504 gateway') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'code 504 received') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'timeout exceeded') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'request aborted') > 0, '504 Gateway Timeout',
      position(msg_lower, 'server error') > 0, '500 Server Error',
      position(msg_lower, 'no available server') > 0, 'No available server / service unavailable',
      position(msg_lower, 'redis.exceptions') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'kvrocks') > 0, 'Redis / kvrocks',
      position(msg_lower, 'django.db.utils.operationalerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'database system is') > 0, 'Postgres / DB (operational)',
      position(msg_lower, 'integrityerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'foreign key constraint') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'unique constraint') > 0, 'Postgres / DB (integrity)',
      position(msg_lower, 'rq.timeouts.jobtimeoutexception') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'takes too long chunks') > 0, 'Timeouts / background jobs',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'cannot read properties of') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'can''t access property') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'objectstate must be provided correct label, got wrong value undefined') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cannot set properties of undefined') > 0), 'JS null/undefined access',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'is not a function') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'is not iterable') > 0), 'JS type/method errors',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'setting getter-only property') > 0, 'JS read-only property assignment',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'the start frame is out of the job') > 0, 'Client validation / frame bounds',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'canvas') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'webgl') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'createimagebitmap') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'createobjecturl') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'getimagedata') > 0), 'Canvas / WebGL / memory',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'react error') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, '__reactfiber') > 0), 'React / DOM',
      source = 'client' AND (startsWith(msg_lower, '**shapes**') OR startsWith(msg_lower, '**labels**')), 'Debug logging / shapes dump',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'queryselector') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'not a valid selector') > 0), 'JS DOM API / Selectors',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'session has not been initialized yet. call annotations.get() or annotations.clear({ reload: true }) before') > 0, 'CVAT-core / Business Logic',
      position(msg_lower, 'reached the maximum number of projects') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cachetoolargedataerror') > 0, 'Quotas / size limits',
      position(msg_lower, 'decompressionbomberror') > 0, 'Quotas / size limits (image bomb)',
      position(msg_lower, 'polygon must have at least') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'all the objects must have the same label') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'expected only one visible shape per frame') > 0, 'Geometry / annotation rules',
      position(msg_lower, 'action name must be unique') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'all label names must be unique') > 0, 'Uniqueness / names / ids',
      position(msg_lower, 'label') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, 'is not registered for this task') > 0, 'Labels not registered',
      position(msg_lower, 'trying to save an attribute') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, 'invalid value') > 0, 'Attributes invalid value',
      position(msg_lower, 'unsupported media type') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'file must be file instance') > 0, 'Unsupported / invalid input',
      position(msg_lower, 'unexpected type of track') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'skeleton template must be specified') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cannot join these polygons: the operation would create a shape with holes, which is not supported by cvat. please select different polygons or use the mask tool.') > 0, 'Geometry / annotation rules',
      position(msg_lower, 'oserror: [errno 36]') > 0, 'OS error / file system',
      startsWith(msg_lower, 'rest_framework.exceptions.notfound'), 'DRF 404 / NotFound',
      position(msg_lower, 'rest_framework.exceptions.methodnotallowed') > 0, 'DRF MethodNotAllowed',
      position(msg_lower, 'datumaro.components.errors') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'annotationexporterror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'itemexporterror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'repeateditemerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'datumaro.components.contexts.importer._importfail') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'there is no item named ''project.json'' in the archive') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'there is no item named ''task.json'' in the archive') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'no media data found') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'no image found') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cvat.apps.dataset_manager.bindings.cvatimporterror') > 0, 'Import/Export / Datumaro',
      position(msg_lower, 'cloudstoragemissingerror') > 0, 'Cloud storage / file missing',
      position(msg_lower, 'invalidimageerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'unidentifiedimageerror') > 0, 'Invalid image file',
      position(msg_lower, 'runtimeerror: exception occurred during compression of image') > 0, 'Image compression errors',
      position(msg_lower, 'av.error') > 0, 'AV / codec errors',
      position(msg_lower, 'filenotfounderror: [errno 2] no such file or directory') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'manifest.jsonl') > 0, 'File not found / missing file',
      position(msg_lower, 'not found on the cloud storage') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'resource ali-') > 0, 'Cloud storage / file not found',
      position(msg_lower, 'trying to use undefined cloud storage') > 0, 'Cloud storage / config error',
      position(msg_lower, 'already being processed (action=') > 0, 'Concurrent export/import / duplicate request',
      position(msg_lower, 'duplicate key value violates unique constraint') > 0, 'DB duplicate key',
      position(msg_lower, 'locknotownederror') > 0, 'Redis lock / concurrency',
      'Other / uncategorized'
    ) AS category
  FROM base
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    period,
    source,
    category,
    count() AS error_count,
    uniqExactIf(user_id, isNotNull(user_id)) AS unique_users
  FROM categorized
  GROUP BY period, source, category
), cur AS (
  SELECT source, category, error_count, unique_users
  FROM agg
  WHERE period = 'current'
), prev AS (
  SELECT source, category, error_count AS prev_error_count, unique_users AS prev_unique_users
  FROM agg
  WHERE period = 'previous'
)
SELECT
  cur.source AS source,
  cur.category AS category,
  cur.error_count AS error_count,
  round(cur.error_count * 100.0 / sum(cur.error_count) OVER (), 2) AS percentage,
  cur.unique_users AS unique_users,
  ifNull(prev.prev_error_count, 0) AS prev_error_count,
  if(ifNull(prev.prev_error_count, 0) = 0, NULL, round((cur.error_count - prev.prev_error_count) * 100.0 / prev.prev_error_count, 2)) AS delta_percent,
  ifNull(prev.prev_unique_users, 0) AS prev_unique_users
FROM cur
LEFT JOIN prev ON cur.category = prev.category AND cur.source = prev.source
ORDER BY cur.error_count DESC

SELECT
  category,
  msg_lower AS error,
  source,
  count() AS error_count,
  uniqExactIf(user_id, isNotNull(user_id)) AS unique_users
FROM
(
  SELECT
    source,
    user_id,
    msg_lower,
    multiIf(
      position(msg_lower, 'network error') > 0, 'Network Error',
      position(msg_lower, 'bad gateway') > 0, '502 Bad Gateway',
      position(msg_lower, 'gateway time-out') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, '504 gateway') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'code 504 received') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'timeout exceeded') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'request aborted') > 0, '504 Gateway Timeout',
      position(msg_lower, 'server error') > 0, '500 Server Error',
      position(msg_lower, 'no available server') > 0, 'No available server / service unavailable',
      position(msg_lower, 'redis.exceptions') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'kvrocks') > 0, 'Redis / kvrocks',
      position(msg_lower, 'django.db.utils.operationalerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'database system is') > 0, 'Postgres / DB (operational)',
      position(msg_lower, 'integrityerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'foreign key constraint') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'unique constraint') > 0, 'Postgres / DB (integrity)',
      position(msg_lower, 'rq.timeouts.jobtimeoutexception') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'takes too long chunks') > 0, 'Timeouts / background jobs',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'cannot read properties of') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'can''t access property') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'objectstate must be provided correct label, got wrong value undefined') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cannot set properties of undefined') > 0), 'JS null/undefined access',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'is not a function') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'is not iterable') > 0), 'JS type/method errors',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'setting getter-only property') > 0, 'JS read-only property assignment',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'the start frame is out of the job') > 0, 'Client validation / frame bounds',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'canvas') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'webgl') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'createimagebitmap') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'createobjecturl') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'getimagedata') > 0), 'Canvas / WebGL / memory',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'react error') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, '__reactfiber') > 0), 'React / DOM',
      source = 'client' AND (startsWith(msg_lower, '**shapes**') OR startsWith(msg_lower, '**labels**')), 'Debug logging / shapes dump',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'queryselector') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'not a valid selector') > 0), 'JS DOM API / Selectors',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'session has not been initialized yet. call annotations.get() or annotations.clear({ reload: true }) before') > 0, 'CVAT-core / Business Logic',
      
      position(msg_lower, 'reached the maximum number of projects') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cachetoolargedataerror') > 0, 'Quotas / size limits',
      position(msg_lower, 'decompressionbomberror') > 0, 'Quotas / size limits (image bomb)',
      position(msg_lower, 'polygon must have at least') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'all the objects must have the same label') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'expected only one visible shape per frame') > 0, 'Geometry / annotation rules',
      position(msg_lower, 'action name must be unique') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'all label names must be unique') > 0, 'Uniqueness / names / ids',
      position(msg_lower, 'label') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, 'is not registered for this task') > 0, 'Labels not registered',
      position(msg_lower, 'trying to save an attribute') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, 'invalid value') > 0, 'Attributes invalid value',
      position(msg_lower, 'unsupported media type') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'file must be file instance') > 0, 'Unsupported / invalid input',
      position(msg_lower, 'unexpected type of track') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'skeleton template must be specified') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cannot join these polygons: the operation would create a shape with holes, which is not supported by cvat. please select different polygons or use the mask tool.') > 0, 'Geometry / annotation rules',
      position(msg_lower, 'oserror: [errno 36]') > 0, 'OS error / file system',
      startsWith(msg_lower, 'rest_framework.exceptions.notfound'), 'DRF 404 / NotFound',
      position(msg_lower, 'rest_framework.exceptions.methodnotallowed') > 0, 'DRF MethodNotAllowed',
      
      position(msg_lower, 'datumaro.components.errors') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'annotationexporterror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'itemexporterror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'repeateditemerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'datumaro.components.contexts.importer._importfail') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'there is no item named ''project.json'' in the archive') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'there is no item named ''task.json'' in the archive') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'no media data found') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'no image found') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cvat.apps.dataset_manager.bindings.cvatimporterror') > 0, 'Import/Export / Datumaro',
      position(msg_lower, 'cloudstoragemissingerror') > 0, 'Cloud storage / file missing',
      position(msg_lower, 'invalidimageerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'unidentifiedimageerror') > 0, 'Invalid image file',
      position(msg_lower, 'runtimeerror: exception occurred during compression of image') > 0, 'Image compression errors',
      position(msg_lower, 'av.error') > 0, 'AV / codec errors',
      position(msg_lower, 'filenotfounderror: [errno 2] no such file or directory') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'manifest.jsonl') > 0, 'File not found / missing file',
      position(msg_lower, 'not found on the cloud storage') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'resource ali-') > 0, 'Cloud storage / file not found',
      position(msg_lower, 'trying to use undefined cloud storage') > 0, 'Cloud storage / config error',
      position(msg_lower, 'already being processed (action=') > 0, 'Concurrent export/import / duplicate request',
      position(msg_lower, 'duplicate key value violates unique constraint') > 0, 'DB duplicate key',
      position(msg_lower, 'locknotownederror') > 0, 'Redis lock / concurrency',
      'Other / uncategorized'
    ) AS category
  FROM
  (
    SELECT
      source,
      user_id,
      lowerUTF8(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message')) AS msg_lower
    FROM cvat.events
    WHERE scope = 'send:exception'
      AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
      AND source IN (${sources})
    AND length(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'))) > 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'permissiondenied') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'validationerror:') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'django.http.response.http404') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'you do not have permission to perform this action.') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'limitreachedexception:') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'throttled') = 0
  AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'request failed with status code 429') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'matches the given query.') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cloud storage instance was deleted') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cvatdatasetnotfounderror') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authenticationfailed') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'no media data found') = 0
      AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authentication credentials were not provided') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'rest_framework.exceptions.notacceptable: could not satisfy the request accept header') = 0
     
  ) raw
) categorized
WHERE '${category}' = '__all' OR category = '${category}'
GROUP BY category, msg_lower, source
ORDER BY error_count DESC
LIMIT 200

WITH current_period AS (
  SELECT source, count() AS current_count
  FROM cvat.events
  WHERE scope = 'send:exception'
    AND timestamp >= $__fromTime
    AND timestamp <= $__toTime
    AND source IN (${sources})
    AND length(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'))) > 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'permissiondenied') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'validationerror:') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'django.http.response.http404') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'you do not have permission to perform this action.') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'limitreachedexception:') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'throttled') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'request failed with status code 429') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'matches the given query.') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cloud storage instance was deleted') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cvatdatasetnotfounderror') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authenticationfailed') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'no media data found') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authentication credentials were not provided') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'rest_framework.exceptions.notacceptable: could not satisfy the request accept header') = 0
  GROUP BY source
), previous_period AS (
  SELECT source, count() AS previous_count
  FROM cvat.events
  WHERE scope = 'send:exception'
    AND timestamp >= ($__fromTime - ($__toTime - $__fromTime))
    AND timestamp < $__fromTime
    AND source IN (${sources})
    AND length(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'))) > 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'permissiondenied') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'validationerror:') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'django.http.response.http404') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'you do not have permission to perform this action.') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'limitreachedexception:') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'throttled') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'request failed with status code 429') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'matches the given query.') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cloud storage instance was deleted') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'cvatdatasetnotfounderror') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authenticationfailed') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'no media data found') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'authentication credentials were not provided') = 0
    AND positionCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), 'rest_framework.exceptions.notacceptable: could not satisfy the request accept header') = 0
  GROUP BY source
)
SELECT
  coalesce(c.source, p.source) AS source,
  ifNull(c.current_count, 0) AS current_count,
  ifNull(p.previous_count, 0) AS previous_count
FROM current_period c
FULL OUTER JOIN previous_period p ON c.source = p.source
ORDER BY source

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT source FROM cvat.events WHERE scope = 'send:exception' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
list.label: Source
list.name: sources
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT source FROM cvat.events WHERE scope = 'send:exception' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

list.label: Category
list.name: category
list.query:
SELECT category FROM (
  SELECT arrayJoin([
    'Network Error',
    'JS null/undefined access',
    '500 Server Error',
    '502 Bad Gateway',
    '504 Gateway Timeout',
    'Other / uncategorized',
    'AV / codec errors',
    'Attributes invalid value',
    
    'CVAT-core / Business Logic',
    'Canvas / WebGL / memory',
    'Cloud storage / config error',
    'Cloud storage / file missing',
    'Cloud storage / file not found',
    'Concurrent export/import / duplicate request',
    'DB duplicate key',
    'DRF 404 / NotFound',
    'DRF MethodNotAllowed',
    'Debug logging / shapes dump',
    'File not found / missing file',
    'Geometry / annotation rules',
    'Image compression errors',
    'Import/Export / Datumaro',
    'Invalid image file',
    'JS DOM API / Selectors',
    'JS type/method errors',
    'Labels not registered',
    'No available server / service unavailable',
    'OS error / file system',
    'Postgres / DB (integrity)',
    'Postgres / DB (operational)',
    'Quotas / size limits',
    'Quotas / size limits (image bomb)',
    
    'React / DOM',
    'Redis / kvrocks',
    'Redis lock / concurrency',
    'Timeouts / background jobs',
    'Uniqueness / names / ids',
    'Unsupported / invalid input'
  ]) AS category
)
ORDER BY category
